rationale: In the citing paper, Huang et al. (2019) is cited only in grouped literature lists, such as prior work showing factors that influence variety seeking (including circadian-related factors) and examples of studies using similar product categories. The citing authors do not discuss the sleepiness mechanism in detail, do not derive hypotheses from it, and do not position their mediation tests as a direct extension or refinement of that paper. Because the citation functions as broad background rather than a distinct building block, the role is mention-level.
